name_cn:
Genuine Grade
Quality Upgrade. Enamel turquoise snake eyes match the original. 【Bvlgari】Bvlgari Counter Classic Hot Selling Series Top Version Serpenti Forever "Single Layer" Clutch. Light gold-plated brass accessories and black and white enamel snake head clasp. Eyes inlaid with real green turquoise. Full copper snake body chain. Two buckle plates, mirror pocket. Includes raincoat, mirror, laser anti-counterfeit tag and printed unique code. Comes with full counter packaging. Model: 35107, Dimensions: 20*15*5cm
